violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment is to apply for a RICFSM with RIDOH. Application was printed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2026
Ham was observed being held past the date of disposition. Ham was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026
The 1 door reach-in gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026
The 3-bay sink plumbing was observed leaking and in poor repair. Plumbing must be maintained in good repair. Per PIC, ticket has been placed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment must apply for a RICFSM. Application was printed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025
Cheese was observed being held past the date of disposition. Cheese was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2025
The 3-bay sink plumbing was observed in poor repair. Plumbing must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

Walk-in cooler was in poor repair, observed with ambient temperature of 52 degrees. Per PIC, no TCS foods are being stored in unit; inspector observed one box of produce in unit. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2025

Chicken and potatoes were observed held at 49-51 degrees Fahrenheit. See disposal. Yogurt and lettuce were observed held at 49-53 degrees Fahrenheit. Per interview with PIC, foods were prepared less than 2 hours prior, foods were relocated to another refrigerator at time of inspection. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025

Walk-in cooler was not in good repair, ambient was 50 degrees Fahrenheit. PIC took unit out of service. PIC informed that no TCS foods can be stored in unit until it reaches an ambient temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2025
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024
The vent above the dishwasher has an accumulation of dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2024
Cases of food were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2024
The caulking used to seal the water tray at the steam table has an accumulation of residue. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2024
Faucet at 3 bay sink was observed leaking. Plumbing systems to be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2023
Wall and door frame by handsink observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2023
Milk cooler gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2023
Faucet at 3 bay sink was observed leaking. Plumbing systems to be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2023
